framework.name: AP2–Verifiable Intent Alignment Confirmed
framework.description: Verifiable Intent is explicitly 'compatible with Agent Payments Protocol' (AP2) and UCP. Google co-developed it. This collapses two of our four framings into one — Mastercard's and Google's are the same thing, not competing.
framework.raw_quote: aligned with Google's Agent Payments Protocol (AP2) and Universal Commerce Protocol (UCP)

source.title: Mastercard, Google Introduce Verifiable Intent as AI Agents Begin ...
